ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment in the program */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the student is enrolled in */,
  "current_semester" TEXT /* Current semester of the student */,
  "expected_graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected graduation date of the student */,
  "cumulative_gpa" TEXT /* Cumulative GPA of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic program */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the program */,
  "duration_years" INTEGER /* Typical duration of the program in years */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the program */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of program (e.g., undergraduate, graduate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "graduation_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of statistics */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Calendar year of the statistics */,
  "students_began" INTEGER /* Number of students who began the program */,
  "students_graduated" INTEGER /* Number of students who graduated */,
  "on_time_graduates" INTEGER /* Number of students who graduated on time */,
  "completion_rate" TEXT /* Completion rate as a percentage */,
  "graduation_rate" TEXT /* Graduation rate as a percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student the record is associated with */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the student */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the student */,
  "residency_status" TEXT /* Residency status (e.g., in-state, out-of-state) */,
  "disability_status" TEXT /* Disability status of the student */,
  "low_income_status" TEXT /* Low-income status of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_demographics_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advisors" (
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advisor */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the advisor */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the advisor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the advisor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the advisor belongs to */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the advisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advisor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_advisors" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advisor-student association */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the advisor */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the advising relationship */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the advising relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_advisors_advisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("advisor_id") REFERENCES advisors ("advisor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_advisors_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, faculty, student) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Permission level of the role (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for user login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user login */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class being attended */,
  "attendance_date" TEXT /* Date of attendance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of attendance (e.g., present, absent) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about attendance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program to which the class belongs */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Credits awarded for completing the class */,
  "class_format" TEXT /* Format of the class (e.g., online, in-person) */,
  "class_status" TEXT /* Status of the class (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each requirement */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the requirement is associated with */,
  "requirement_description" TEXT /* Description of the requirement (e.g., number of credits required) */,
  "requirement_type" TEXT /* Type of requirement (e.g., core, elective) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_requirements_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student the grade is associated with */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the grade is for */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the student (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_grades_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_grades_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student the progress is associated with */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the student is in */,
  "credits_completed" INTEGER /* Number of credits completed by the student */,
  "credits_remaining" INTEGER /* Number of credits remaining for the student to complete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_progress_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_progress_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_support_services" (
  "support_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each support record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student the support is associated with */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the support service (e.g., tutoring, counseling) */,
  "service_date" TEXT /* Date the support service was used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("support_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_support_services_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
